summary: Package exfiltrates data via Telegram Bot API
details: The file 66o.js (lines 31 and 34) contains calls to api.telegram.org/bot endpoints using sendMessage with a chat_id parameter. This is a well-known exfiltration channel used by supply-chain attackers: a hardcoded Telegram bot token and chat_id allow the package author to receive data silently from any machine where the code executes. The package name '8oo' is a short, low-context name with no legitimate documented purpose that would require a Telegram relay. Hardcoded chat destinations in an installed npm package constitute either silent data relay or active exfiltration of installer-side data — either way, installing or loading this package exposes the installer to data leakage to an attacker-controlled Telegram chat.

cwes.description: The product contains code that appears to be malicious in nature.
cwes.name: Embedded Malicious Code
